cases.note: Gen 2 fixed the Gen 1 Ghost vs Psychic bug (0x). Ghost is now 2x super-effective vs Psychic.
Ice attacking Fire: 0.5x in Gen 2 (changed from Gen 1's 1x neutral).
Poison attacking Bug: neutral (1x) in Gen 2. Was 2x super-effective in Gen 1.
Bug attacking Poison: 0.5x in Gen 2. Was 2x super-effective in Gen 1.
Dark type introduced in Gen 2; super-effective vs Psychic (2x).
Dark type is immune to Psychic moves (0x). Introduced in Gen 2.
Dark is super-effective vs Ghost (2x). Introduced in Gen 2.
Electric attacking Steel: 0.5x on Gen 2 cartridge (oracle @pkmn/data incorrectly reports 1x).
Water attacking Steel: 0.5x on Gen 2 cartridge (oracle @pkmn/data incorrectly reports 1x).
Protect has +3 priority on Gen 2 cartridge. Oracle @pkmn/data reports +2 following Showdown's simplified model.

cases.note: Detect shares EFFECT_PROTECT in Gen 2, so priority is +3 on cartridge. Oracle reports +2.
Endure has +3 priority on Gen 2 cartridge. Oracle @pkmn/data reports +2.
